Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}It's as if the energy from the door surged through the entire floor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I can see the floor layout! That makes it easier for me to guide you now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}With the energy released from the Monad door, you have now obtained the map information of the current floor and the floor above.[n]{f 1 1}
